allow: Bash(MSYS_NO_PATHCONV=1 docker run --rm -v julia-depot:/depot julia-mcp-sandbox ls /depot)
Bash(MSYS_NO_PATHCONV=1 docker run --rm -v julia-depot:/depot julia-mcp-sandbox ls -la /depot)
Bash(MSYS_NO_PATHCONV=1 docker run --rm -v julia-depot:/depot julia-mcp-sandbox test -f /depot/.seeded)
Bash(MSYS_NO_PATHCONV=1 docker run --rm -v julia-depot:/home/julia_agent/.julia -v "C:/Users/mthel/julia-scratch:/home/julia_agent/scratch" julia-mcp-sandbox sh -c "echo ''bind mounts work''")
Bash(MSYS_NO_PATHCONV=1 docker run --rm -v julia-depot:/home/julia_agent/.julia julia-mcp-sandbox sh -c "test -f /home/julia_agent/.julia/.seeded && echo seeded || echo not-seeded")
Bash(MSYS_NO_PATHCONV=1 docker run --rm -v julia-depot:/depot julia-mcp-sandbox touch /depot/.seeded)
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; n=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(k, v.get\(''IPAddress''\), v.get\(''Ports''\)\) for k,v in n.get\(''Networks'',{}\).items\(\)]")
Bash(docker run --rm --network julia-mcp-net julia-mcp-sandbox julia -e "using Sockets; s = connect\(""172.18.0.2"", 2625\); println\(""connected""\); close\(s\)")
Bash(docker exec julia-mcp-exec sh -c "cat /proc/net/tcp6 2>/dev/null | head -5 || cat /proc/net/tcp 2>/dev/null | head -5")
Bash(docker exec julia-mcp-exec julia -e 'buf = IOBuffer\(\); redirect_stdout\(buf\) do; println\(""test""\); end; println\(String\(take!\(buf\)\)\)')
Bash(docker exec julia-mcp-exec julia -e 'orig=stdout; rd,wr=redirect_stdout\(\); println\(""hi""\); flush\(stdout\); redirect_stdout\(orig\); close\(wr\); println\(read\(rd,String\)\); close\(rd\)')

Bash(docker exec julia-mcp-exec julia -e 'orig_o=stdout; orig_e=stderr; rd_o,wr_o=redirect_stdout\(\); rd_e,wr_e=redirect_stderr\(\); println\(""out""\); println\(stderr,""err""\); flush\(stdout\); flush\(stderr\); redirect_stdout\(orig_o\); redirect_stderr\(orig_e\); close\(wr_o\); close\(wr_e\); println\(""stdout: "", repr\(read\(rd_o,String\)\)\); println\(""stderr: "", repr\(read\(rd_e,String\)\)\)')
